user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Fika Café (near AGO)
fields.description: Quick coffee break at a popular cafe just a short walk from the Art Gallery of Ontario. Good for espresso, drip coffee, and light pastries—perfect to recharge before the museum visit.

insertion_point.reasoning: Inserts a short coffee break between the Stakeholder Presentation (ends 11:00 AM) and the AGO at 12:00 PM; position 2 places it just before the AGO with time to walk and arrive by noon.
